data.title: Hick’s Law
data.description: Minimizes decision-making time by presenting limited options in menus.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes dropdowns and category tabs for easier navigation.

data.title: Fitts’s Law
data.description: Optimizes button sizes and positions for intuitive clicking.
data.technical_spec: Consistent button placement and resizing based on user interaction data.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Employs visually appealing design for improved user satisfaction.
data.technical_spec: Modern, sleek UI with consistent color schemes and typography.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Prioritizes core content placement based on user attention patterns.
data.technical_spec: Key videos and features are placed prominently on landing pages.

data.title: Jakob’s Law
data.description: Ensures a familiar user experience similar to other popular platforms.
data.technical_spec: Design patterns align with commonly used media sites for ease of transition.
